## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      3 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Apr 30, 2026 - Jul 12, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Mohamed Elboss_, Apr 30, 2026, 1/5: "The application is not working; there are bugs and crashes. The word "opened" appears."
            2. _A Google user_, Jul 12, 2026, 3/5: "I use this greate app. since 2012.Very useful and easy to use. Thanks!!! Update The application have freeze on Hyper OS 3. Please fix that"
            3. _Angelika Justine_, May 18, 2026, 4/5: "I have around 4 budget category running, 5 with other category, It have some scrolling bugs, sometimes when changing wallet in tab budget, it freeze and can not be scrolled, I need to change tab first before it can be scrolled, it is a minor bugs"
